shorts.title_distilled: Community rallies behind officer fighting cancer.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A community rallied behind a police officer fighting cancer on Sunday. Members of the police department pulled together a benefit to support her on her journey. 28/22 News Reporter Colby Hughes stopped by and detailed its success. Nancy Baumann has dedicated more than two decades of her life to the [...]

shorts.title: PennDOT schedules lane restrictions for Route 6
shorts.title_distilled: PennDOT schedules lane restrictions for Route 6.
shorts.description: LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — The Pennsylvania Department of Transportation (PennDOT) has scheduled alternating lane restrictions for Monday on Route 6 eastbound in Lackawanna County. The alternating left and right lane restrictions will be between 7:00 a.m. and 4:00 p.m. Monday and Tuesday for concrete patching. PennDOT says this road work will be between Exit 1 [...]
shorts.content: LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — The Pennsylvania Department of Transportation (PennDOT) has scheduled alternating lane restrictions for Monday on Route 6 eastbound in Lackawanna County. The alternating left and right lane restrictions will be between 7:00 a.m. and 4:00 p.m. Monday and Tuesday for concrete patching. PennDOT says this road work will be between Exit 1 [...]
